home.heroTitle: Growing Pakistan's Future, One Field at a Time
home.heroSubtitle: MRS Agro Chemicals brings you premium quality pesticides trusted by farmers across the country.
home.introText: We are committed to delivering high-quality, effective pesticide solutions backed by agricultural expertise and a nationwide franchise network.

about.heading: Our Story
about.paragraph1: At MRS Agro Chemicals, we believe that the foundation of a bountiful harvest lies in the quality of crop protection. For years, we have dedicated ourselves to supplying Pakistan's farmers with premium, effective pesticide solutions that they can trust season after season.
about.paragraph2: Backed by decades of agricultural expertise and a deep understanding of Pakistan's diverse growing conditions, we work tirelessly to bring innovation to every field. Our commitment extends beyond products — we partner with farmers to ensure they get the support and guidance needed to thrive.
about.value1Text: Every product we supply undergoes rigorous testing to ensure effectiveness, safety, and adaptability to local conditions.
about.value2Text: We prioritise the needs of the farmer, offering expert guidance and responsive support at every step.
about.value3Text: With franchise partners across Pakistan, we make quality pesticides and agricultural expertise accessible to every region.
about.ceoMessageText: At MRS Agro Chemicals, our mission is simple: empower Pakistan's farmers with innovative, reliable, and affordable crop protection solutions. Since inception, we've grown from a single-district operation to a trusted name in agro-inputs, driven by quality, integrity, and farmer-first service. We don't just sell products — we build partnerships with dealers and farmers to ensure higher yields and sustainable agriculture.
about.ceoImageAlt: Malik Umer Rafique — CEO of MRS Agro Chemicals
about.headOfficeValue: Plot No. 106, Phase II, Industrial Estate, Multan, Punjab, Pakistan
about.coreBusinessValue: Manufacturing, formulation, and distribution of pesticides, herbicides, fungicides, and plant growth regulators
about.keyBrandsValue: Mr. Jin, Agri Sulf, Golden Shine, Xtra Star, Cropza, Agro Cut, Perfect Clean
about.visionText: To be Pakistan's most trusted agro chemical company, enabling food security through science and service.
about.mission1: Quality First: DRAP-compliant, lab-tested formulations for consistent field results
about.mission2: Farmer Education: On-ground training on safe usage and integrated pest management
about.mission3: Dealer Growth: Profitable, transparent franchise model with marketing and technical support
about.mission4: Innovation: R&D for climate-resilient and low-residue crop solutions
about.coreValue1Text: What's on the label is what's in the bottle
about.coreValue3Text: We win when our partners win

products.pageSubtitle: Explore our range of premium certified pesticide products, carefully formulated for Pakistan's diverse growing regions.

franchise.pageSubtitle: Proudly serving farmers across Punjab through our authorized franchise network.
franchise.aboutText: Our franchise shop stands as a trusted destination for farmers seeking quality pesticides and expert guidance. Backed by the MRS Agro Chemicals brand, it reflects our commitment to accessibility, service, and long-term partnership with the farming community.
franchise.locationValue: Plot No. 106, Phase II, Industrial Estate, Multan, Punjab, Pakistan
